name: DealScope AI
description: DealScope AI is a structured startup due diligence prompt for founders, angel investors, accelerator mentors, and Web3 builders. Provide a startup name, pitch, or brief company description, and DealScope generates an analyst-style memo covering market intelligence, competitive moat, team and execution, business model, unit economics, risk flags, assumptions, and a GO / CONDITIONAL GO / NO-GO verdict. It is designed for fast first-pass evaluation, founder self-review, investor pre-screening, accelerator feedback, and SEA/Vietnam-aware startup analysis. DealScope does not pull live data and does not provide financial, legal, tax, or investment advice.
tags: Startup, Due Diligence, VC, Investment Research, Founder Tools, SEA, Risk Analysis, Finance

useCases.title: Validate a startup idea before building
useCases.description: Founders can paste a rough startup idea and receive a structured memo that highlights market strength, risks, missing assumptions, and whether the idea deserves further validation.

useCases.title: Pre-screen inbound startup pitches
useCases.description: Angel investors and scouts can turn a short pitch into a first-pass due diligence memo with market, moat, team, business model, and risk analysis.

useCases.title: Create accelerator mentor feedback
useCases.description: Mentors can use DealScope to produce a consistent feedback framework for portfolio startups, including next due diligence questions and validation steps.

useCases.title: Analyze SEA/Vietnam startup opportunities
useCases.description: Builders operating in Southeast Asia can get analysis that considers local market dynamics when relevant, while clearly separating assumptions from verified facts.
